evals.prompt: Run full discovery audit only for this repo.
evals.expected_output: Runs W0 scripts from coordinator-contract.md, produces gap-report.json via gap_engine.py, and does not spawn scouts before gap report exists.
assertions: Uses deterministic scripts before agentic scouts
Gap report includes domain priorities from taxonomy

evals.prompt: Plan wave 2 scouts from the gap report, then verify accounting before ideation.
evals.expected_output: Emits wave manifest with expected_count, writes scout artifacts to manifest paths, and blocks ideation until coordinator verify returns ok true.
assertions: Enforces N dispatched equals N resolved
Does not install skills without user confirmation

evals.prompt: Find me a skill for Redis caching right now.
evals.expected_output: Redirects to ad-hoc find-skills or npx skills find rather than full discover-skills orchestration.
assertions: Does not spawn full Pattern E team by default

evals.prompt: What skills am I missing in this repo?
evals.expected_output: Auto-invokes discover-skills full discovery: W0 deterministic scans, gap report, then coordinator-planned scouts — not a one-off npx find.
assertions: Treats question syntax as full discovery per auto-detection heuristic
Does not install without user confirmation

evals.prompt: /discover-skills create a new skill called redis-cache-helper
evals.expected_output: Refuses skill authoring scope and redirects to skill-creator; does not scaffold SKILL.md.
assertions: Names skill-creator as the correct alternative
Does not run scaffold or write skill files

evals.expected_output: Runs W0 deterministic scans only and returns gap-report summary without spawning wave-2 scouts.
assertions: Produces gap report before any scout wave

evals.expected_output: Lists discovery journal sessions from journal-store without starting a new discovery run.
Loads the latest journal session, restores artifact_root when present, and continues from the saved wave.
assertions: Does not restart W0 when checkpoint exists
